action.reasoning: Observation: Iter28 TTA with 30 views (D4 + random rotations + pad/crop) dropped accuracy from 0.8158 to 0.7927. Analysis: Random rotations likely hurt due to severe distortion on tiny 32x32 images; the previous successful TTA (iter27) used D4 symmetries and additional random crops/flips without rotations, achieving 0.8158. Decision: Revert predict.py to a robust TTA using D4 (8 views) + random padded crops/flips (no rotation), 30 views total, ensemble best.pt and last.pt. Submit eval immediately to recover best score. Time remaining allows 1-2 more evals if needed.
